title: Claude Code skill / slash-command frontmatter
description: Custom commands have been merged into skills; both share this frontmatter.

name.description: Display name. If omitted, uses the directory or file name. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only (max 64 characters).

description.description: What the skill does and when to use it. Claude uses this to decide when to apply the skill.

when_to_use.description: Additional context for when Claude should invoke the skill, such as trigger phrases or example requests.

argument-hint.description: Hint shown during autocomplete to indicate expected arguments. Example: '[issue-number]' or '[filename] [format]'.

arguments.description: Named positional arguments for $name substitution in the skill content.

disable-model-invocation.description: Set to true to prevent Claude from automatically loading this skill. Default: false.

user-invocable.description: Set to false to hide from the / menu. Default: true.

allowed-tools.description: Tools Claude can use without asking permission when this skill is active.

model.description: Model to use when this skill is active. Accepts 'sonnet', 'opus', 'haiku', a full model ID, or 'inherit'.

effort.description: Effort level when this skill is active.

context.description: Set to 'fork' to run in a forked subagent context.

agent.description: Which subagent type to use when context: fork is set.

hooks.description: Hooks scoped to this skill's lifecycle.

paths.description: Glob patterns that limit when this skill is activated automatically.

shell.description: Shell to use for !`command` and ```! blocks. Defaults to bash.
